title: MoreCosmetics+
description: Addon for Custom Cosmetics, various new models/built in cosmetics
body:
# MoreCosmetics+  
_This mod is an addon for Custom Cosmetics, and adds **4** new models, and a variety of new cosmetics!_
_.bbmodels are downloadable as a secondary file in each version to allow others to make resourcepack addons for this mod_

## Sneak Peak  
_view the gallery, for all cosmetics_
  
**New Hats !**  
![Santa Hat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e41050ab773c7e6e12ed3a2504beacb89667deaa.png)  
  
**Animal Ears !**  
![Piglin Ears](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4d4cd2106977db3b16c2b1d046c7d9ac21461aa.png)  
  
### How To Use  
After installing the mod, run the command `/cosmetics inject all` or `cosmetics inject mod morecosmetics`  
### Notice
Modpack Devs: If you run the command before distributing your modpack, the users will not be required to run it.
